ab: mosa su inu?
ch: A:你要去哪裡?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: mosa cu mayah ru muhi rami.
ch: B:我要去菜園裡種菜。
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: lalu cyu su ptyawun?
ch: A:你在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: nyu k’man ci la, nyu cu smlyat k’man, ksya’an mu ’sya kisa.
ch: B:草太多了，我在砍草，等一下要澆水。
en: B:There’s too much grass, I’m cutting it, I’ll have to water it later.

ab: hay magan cikah soki ru karoh mu aras cahay ma?
ch: A:幫我把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來好嗎?
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: cyu su ccyan inu?
ch: B:你放在哪裡呢?
en: B: Where did you put it?

ab: cyu beh syaw lihun khu.
ch: A:放在倉庫門旁邊。
en: A: Put it next to the door of the warehouse.

ab: waya su spoxun kmoyah uraw la?
ch: A:你翻過土了嗎?
en: A: Did you turn over the soil?

ab: waya mu spoxun kmoyah micu ci, naga cikah lga tbuxun mu la.
ch: B:我剛翻過土，等等要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: ba’un kmyut nuhiy su rami la?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: nyu cahay kanrang ga ba’un magan la, cyu haca sina ga ini ba’iy magan na.
ch: B:這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的昭和草就還不能收成。
en: B: The cabbage here is ready to be harvested, but the Showa grass there is not yet ready to be harvested.

ab: waw! talagay knoyah su ngahi.
ch: A:哇!你挖了這麼多的地瓜。
en: A: Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: haliy smku cikah khu mu ki?
ch: B:幫我放穀倉好嗎?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: lalu cyu mamu ptyawun?
ch: A:你們在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: nyu cami cmi ami pkiyak ’cyux.
ch: B:我們在放漁網抓魚。
en: B: We’re releasing fishing nets to catch fish.

ab: piyux ’cyux nya cahay?
ch: A:這裡的魚多嗎?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: iyik tara mu ga piyux ci kniyak mu ’cyux la.
ch: B:魚簍裡已經抓了很多魚。
en: B: The fish basket has been full of fish.

ab: maha su kenu kmiyak ’cyux kryax?
ch: A:你平常怎麼抓魚?
en: A: How do you usually catch fish?

ab: s’agan mu beta ’cyux cmu ’cyux kryax.
ch: B:我都用魚叉射魚。
en: B: I shoot fish with a spear.

ab: s’agan su pnelu mosa mluyak?
ch: A:你會用弓箭打獵嗎?
en: A: Do you know how to hunt with a bow and arrow?

ab: cmi cu t’oya kmiyak ksinu kryax, kruma ga magan cu patus ru maras cu hoyin mosa mluyak.
ch: B:我通常都是用陷阱抓獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
en: B: I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

ab: cahay ga tu’iy nwahan biyak kahong.
ch: A:這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: ca su ba’un?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: kwe ga rapan na biyak kahong, nanu yaca cahay ga tu’iy nwahan na biyak kahong.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: helaw ta mosa mita t’oya ta, yani hayi cyu ciri ksinu la.
ch: A:快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
en: A: Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

ab: ca su ba’un?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: yani hayi cyu sokan hoyin la. nahay hayi hay ta mluw.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let’s follow them.

ab: lalu cyu su kle’un?
ch: A:你正在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: kwani ga rangay, wahan ta kmiyak olit.
ch: B:這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
en: B: This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

ab: cyu su pcyan haca ga lalu kyaca?
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: kyaca ga t’oya, s’agan mu ciri para.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: mhway gnalu na lutux bnkisan, piyux ci pnaga ta ksinu soni.
ch: A:感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: angu ha! rasaw ta alang ta le’aw ta m’asu ru s’un mani.
ch: B:是啊!我們帶回部落好好分享吧!
en: B: Yeah! Let’s take it back to the tribe and share it!
